title: Learn SPSV Industry lesson by lesson.
description: Study authorities, operations, compliance, safety, customer service, licensing and maps in focused lessons.

lessons.title: Industry Authorities, Compliance and Offences
lessons.intro: NTA, Garda, RSA, compliance officers, complaints and fixed-payment offences.
lessons.memoryTrick: NTA regulates SPSV services; Garda enforce road and licence obligations.
commonMistakes: Confusing SPSV-specific rules with general rules

lessons.title: Taxi Operation, Ranks, Dispatch and Fares
lessons.intro: Taxi ranks, standing for hire, dispatch, roof signs, meters, fares and receipts.
lessons.memoryTrick: Rank, roof sign, meter and receipt belong to daily taxi operation.
commonMistakes: Confusing SPSV-specific rules with general rules

lessons.title: Vehicle Roadworthiness and Safety
lessons.intro: Tyres, lights, windows, equipment, suitability and passenger safety.
lessons.memoryTrick: Tyres, lights, glass and equipment must all pass.
commonMistakes: Confusing SPSV-specific rules with general rules

lessons.title: Customer Service and Passenger Rights
lessons.intro: Complaints, difficult passengers, refusal rights and professional conduct.
commonMistakes: Confusing SPSV-specific rules with general rules

lessons.title: Licensing, Inspections and Required Documents
lessons.intro: Licences, assessments, tamper-proof discs and required documents.
lessons.memoryTrick: Licence valid, disc visible, documents ready.
commonMistakes: Confusing SPSV-specific rules with general rules

lessons.title: Maps and Area Knowledge
lessons.intro: Routes, road classifications and grid-reference questions.
lessons.memoryTrick: Read the legend, trace the route, confirm the grid.
commonMistakes: Confusing SPSV-specific rules with general rules

lessons.title: Final Mixed SPSV Industry Test
lessons.memoryTrick: Identify the topic before choosing the rule.
